name: iPhone 15 Pro Max
description: Apple's flagship smartphone featuring the A17 Pro chip, titanium design, 48MP camera system with 5x optical zoom, and USB-C connectivity. The most powerful iPhone ever made.

name: MacBook Air M3
description: Supercharged by the M3 chip with 8-core CPU, 10-core GPU, 18 hours of battery life, and a stunning 13.6-inch Liquid Retina display. Fanless, silent, impossibly thin.

name: MacBook Pro 16" M3 Max
description: The ultimate pro laptop with M3 Max chip, up to 128GB unified memory, 22-hour battery life, and a breathtaking 16-inch Liquid Retina XDR display. Built for the most demanding workflows.

name: Sony WH-1000XM5
description: Industry-leading noise cancellation with Auto NC Optimizer, crystal clear hands-free calling, and up to 30 hours of battery life. Exceptionally comfortable with soft-fit leather.

name: Samsung S95C 65" OLED TV
description: Quantum Dot OLED delivers pure blacks and vivid colors. Neural Quantum Processor 4K AI-upscaling, anti-reflection technology, and Dolby Atmos immersive sound.

name: Canon EOS R5 Mark II
description: Next-generation full-frame mirrorless with 45MP stacked CMOS sensor, 8K 60p RAW video, Eye Control AF, and in-body image stabilization up to 8.5 stops.

name: Apple Watch Ultra 2
description: The most rugged Apple Watch with 49mm titanium case, precision dual-frequency GPS, up to 36 hours of battery life, and the brightest Always-On display at 3000 nits.

name: Dell XPS 16 (2024)
description: Premium 16-inch laptop with Intel Core Ultra 9 processor, NVIDIA GeForce RTX 4070, 4K OLED touch display, and a seamless edge-to-edge keyboard. Stunning in every detail.

name: iPad Pro 13" M4
description: The thinnest Apple product ever with the blazing M4 chip, Ultra Retina XDR OLED tandem display, Apple Pencil Pro support, and all-day battery life.

name: Sony Alpha A7 IV
description: Full-frame mirrorless camera with 33MP Exmor R CMOS sensor, real-time Eye AF for humans and animals, 4K 60p video, and 10fps burst shooting.

name: LG C4 77" OLED evo
description: Self-lit OLED with α9 AI Processor 4K Gen7, Dolby Vision & Atmos, 120Hz refresh rate, and webOS 24. Perfect blacks, infinite contrast, gaming paradise.

name: Logitech MX Keys S
description: Advanced wireless illuminated keyboard with smart backlighting, Perfect Stroke keys, Easy-Switch for up to 3 devices, and USB-C fast charging. Pairs with MX Master 3S.

name: PlayStation 5 Pro
description: Enhanced gaming console with 67% more powerful GPU, advanced ray tracing, PlayStation Spectral Super Resolution AI upscaling, and 2TB SSD storage. Next-gen gaming redefined.

name: Bose QuietComfort Ultra
description: World-class noise cancellation with Immersive Audio using Bose spatial sound. CustomTune technology adapts sound to your ears. Up to 24 hours of battery life.

name: Samsung Galaxy Tab S9 Ultra
description: 14.6-inch Dynamic AMOLED 2X display, Snapdragon 8 Gen 2 processor, IP68 water resistance, S Pen included, and Samsung DeX for desktop-like productivity.

name: Samsung Galaxy S24 Ultra
description: Galaxy AI-powered smartphone with 200MP camera, titanium frame, 6.8-inch QHD+ AMOLED display, built-in S Pen, and Snapdragon 8 Gen 3 processor.

name: Garmin Fenix 8 Solar
description: Premium multisport GPS watch with solar charging, AMOLED display, advanced training metrics, up to 48 days battery life, and built-in flashlight. Adventure-ready.

name: ASUS ROG Strix G18 (2024)
description: Gaming powerhouse with Intel Core i9-14900HX, NVIDIA RTX 4080, 18-inch QHD+ 240Hz display, per-key RGB keyboard, and advanced liquid metal cooling.

name: Sonos Era 300
description: Spatial audio speaker with Dolby Atmos support, six drivers and two tweeters, line-in and Bluetooth connectivity, and Trueplay room-tuning technology.

name: Nikon Z8
description: Professional full-frame mirrorless with 45.7MP stacked sensor, 120fps RAW burst, 8K video, built-in vertical grip, and dual card slots. Z9 power, compact body.
